// SLIDE 05 — NEEDS-VISUAL

mcp-by-design-vox — B05

NEEDS-VISUAL → binaryBranchShould show: two diverging paths from a single decision point

mcp-in-your-hands — B02

NEEDS-VISUAL → binaryBranchShould show: two diverging paths from a single decision point
